text_block_list.text:
I'm walking down the hallway one day when I hear
Fuji Kiseki's voice echoing out from the dance
studio.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: One, two, three!

I don't want to bother her while she's in the zone,
so I wait quietly by the door for her to finish.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Seven, eight!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I knew it. That last section is lacking refinement...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer. I didn't know you were here.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
This is perfect, though. There's something I want
to ask you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Well, I wanted to ask if I should try to push myself
to my limits or pursue a more tranquil
performance.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Specifically, I'm torn between wowing people with
dynamic choreography or entrancing them with a
performance harmonious in both song and dance.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Both have their own merits, so I'm not sure which
to choose.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If it were you, would you aim to create a
sensational dance or a more balanced
performance?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense. Anyone would be intrigued by
moves they've never seen before.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And of course, every performer worth their salt
must possess an indelible brilliance that dazzles
all.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! I know exactly what to do now. I'm going
to steal everyone's breath with a truly
phenomenal dance.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And to achieve that, I must push myself to greater
heights and make my moves faster, higher, and
sharper!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

She lets out a battle cry and begins dancing with
the finesse of a professional. There's no doubt
she's one of the best dancers in the whole school.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I feel the same. If I'm going to watch something,
I'd want it to be an undeniably flawless show.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Right. I'll have to perfect my every move for this.
Even the slightest misstep can disrupt the balance
of a performance.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to disappoint my adoring ponies
now! ♪

She diligently adjusts her movements. It surely
won't be long before her performance is polished
to perfection.
